title: tabernaemontana attenuata
intro: Tabernaemontana attenuata, also known as the 'Yellow Form' or 'Attenuated Stem Tabernaemontana', is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana attenuata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a cardiac stimulant. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
